parameters.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS intake_items (id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, received_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), source_msg_id TEXT, type TEXT, title TEXT, due_at TIMESTAMPTZ, student TEXT, action_required BOOLEAN, amount TEXT, teacher TEXT, course TEXT, source_hint TEXT, confidence REAL, source_channel TEXT, source_subject TEXT, source_from TEXT); ALTER TABLE intake_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_msg_id TEXT; CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS intake_items_msgid_idx ON intake_items(source_msg_id);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Inbound Mail Webhook').first().json.body.messageId || (($('Inbound Mail Webhook').first().json.body.from || '') + '|' + ($('Inbound Mail Webhook').first().json.body.subject || '') + '|' + ($('Inbound Mail Webhook').first().json.body.date || '')) }}
